name: cultural
description: SKETCH (structure only; node corpora not yet assembled). Discover-mode manifold folding the four bundled cultural-values vectors into one derived surface: masculine.feminine (Hofstede MAS), individualist.collectivist (Hofstede IDV), traditional.progressive and religious.secular (Inglehart-Welzel Traditional<->Secular-Rational). Nodes are the eight vector poles plus a neutral `default` anchor; each pole's corpus is to be assembled by splitting the corresponding bundled vector's contrastive pair statements (statements.json) into its positive/negative pole, so no new generation is required. fit_mode is `pca` (discover) rather than authored on purpose: unlike PAD/circumplex the right coordinate frame is not cleanly declarable (Hofstede is 6-D, Inglehart 2-D), so per-model PCA derives the layout and the fit reports whether the poles even cohere into a low-dim surface. Hypothesis: the documented masculine.feminine <-> traditional.progressive entanglement (+0.5-0.6, Hofstede MAS read as traditionalism) means the eight poles collapse below four dimensions, recovering an Inglehart-Welzel-like 2-D cultural map. max_subspace_dim caps the fit; var_threshold (default 0.70) picks the actual dim.
